title: Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to enter into memorandum of agrrement with the Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños, Laguna (AMELBA-UNA, INC.) and KAISER International Health Group, Inc. for Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) Benefits for qualified civilian personnel of the Municipal Government of Los Baños in accordance with Section 7.1.1. of the Department of Budget and Management
